title: China Passage
writer: Edmund L. Hartmann, J. Robert Bren, Taylor Caven
actors: Constance Worth, Vinton Hayworth, Leslie Fenton
plot: Tommy Baldwin and Joe Dugan are entrusted to carry a fabulous diamond. If they succeed, they will be well paid. If they fail, they will be well buried. When they go to pick up the diamond, there is a great gun battle, a cannister ...
